text:
* gerald@FreeBSD.org (gerald@FreeBSD.org) wrote:

> Thanks for proposing this patch.  I had considered such a change, but
> am not planning to make this for lang/gcc42.

Please give me a reason why not. It does add functionality and increase
compatibility, it does not break or even affect anything else.
